approvalTitle: Tasks: デプロイパス計算共通化のタスク分解
content:
# Tasks Document: web-hosting-deploy-path

- [ ] 1. `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` Composite Action を作成
  - File: `.github/actions/compute-web-hosting-deploy-path/action.yml`
  - `github` コンテキストから ref-name を自動導出し、デプロイパスと本番判定を計算する Composite Action を新規作成
  - Inputs: `base-path-prefix`, `production-branch`, `ref-name`（オーバーライド）
  - Outputs: `deploy-path`, `is-production`, `ref-name`
  - ブランチ名の `/` → `-` サニタイズ処理を含む
  - ref-name 空文字時のバリデーションを含む
  - Purpose: デプロイパス計算ロジックの共通化
  - _Leverage: 設計書の Component 1 セクション、既存の Composite Actions パターン（`.github/actions/deploy-web-hosting-ftp/action.yml` 等）_
  - _Requirements: 1, 4, 5_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec web-hosting-deploy-path, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: GitHub Actions Developer specializing in Composite Actions | Task: Create `.github/actions/compute-web-hosting-deploy-path/action.yml` that computes deploy paths from `github` context. Read the design document at `.spec-workflow/specs/web-hosting-deploy-path/design.md` for the complete logic (Component 1 section). The action must: (1) derive ref-name from `github.event_name`/`github.head_ref`/`github.ref_name` when override is not provided, (2) sanitize branch names by replacing `/` with `-`, (3) determine `is-production` by comparing ref-name with `production-branch`, (4) compute `deploy-path` as `base-path-prefix + feature-suffix`. Use `env:` to pass `github` context values to shell. Include `# Documentation:` comment on line 1. | Restrictions: Do not require checkout, do not modify any existing files, follow the project's kebab-case naming convention, use SHA pin for any external actions (none needed here) | Success: Action file exists at `.github/actions/compute-web-hosting-deploy-path/action.yml`, all inputs/outputs match the design spec, logic handles PR/push/repository_dispatch/workflow_dispatch events correctly, ref-name override works, empty ref-name validation works. After completing implementation, mark this task as `[-]` in tasks.md, then log implementation with log-implementation tool, then mark as `[x]`._

- [ ] 2. `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` のドキュメントを作成
  - File: `.github/actions/docs/compute-web-hosting-deploy-path.md`
  - 既存のドキュメントパターンに従い、Action の使用方法・入出力・利用例を記載
  - Purpose: 利用者向けドキュメント
  - _Leverage: 既存ドキュメント（`.github/actions/docs/deploy-web-hosting-ftp.md` 等）_
  - _Requirements: 1, 5_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec web-hosting-deploy-path, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Technical Writer for GitHub Actions documentation | Task: Create `.github/actions/docs/compute-web-hosting-deploy-path.md` following the format of existing docs like `.github/actions/docs/deploy-web-hosting-ftp.md`. Include: overview, inputs table, outputs table, usage examples for PR/push/repository_dispatch scenarios, and ref-name override example. Refer to design document at `.spec-workflow/specs/web-hosting-deploy-path/design.md` for Migration Guide examples. | Restrictions: Follow existing doc structure exactly, do not modify existing docs, use Japanese for descriptions | Success: Doc file exists, follows existing format, covers all inputs/outputs/examples, includes ref-name override usage. After completing implementation, mark this task as `[-]` in tasks.md, then log implementation with log-implementation tool, then mark as `[x]`._

- [ ] 3. `deploy-web-hosting.yml` Reusable Workflow を更新
  - File: `.github/workflows/deploy-web-hosting.yml`
  - inputs から `is-pr`, `base-path`, `is-production` を削除
  - inputs に `base-path-prefix`, `production-branch`, `ref-name` を追加
  - `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` ステップをジョブの先頭に追加
  - 後続ステップの参照を `steps.compute-path.outputs.*` に変更
  - PR コメント / Slack 通知の `if` 条件を `github.event_name` ベースに変更
  - Purpose: Workflow の入力簡素化とパス計算の内部化
  - _Leverage: 設計書の Component 2 セクション、現在の `.github/workflows/deploy-web-hosting.yml`_
  - _Requirements: 2, 4_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec web-hosting-deploy-path, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: GitHub Actions Developer specializing in Reusable Workflows | Task: Update `.github/workflows/deploy-web-hosting.yml` following the design document Component 2 section at `.spec-workflow/specs/web-hosting-deploy-path/design.md`. Read the current file first, then: (1) Replace inputs `is-pr`/`base-path`/`is-production` with `base-path-prefix`/`production-branch`/`ref-name`, (2) Add `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` step as first step in the job, (3) Update all references from `inputs.base-path` to `steps.compute-path.outputs.deploy-path`, (4) Update all references from `inputs.is-production` to `steps.compute-path.outputs.is-production`, (5) Replace `inputs.is-pr` with `github.event_name == 'pull_request'` in if conditions, (6) Update the Documentation comment path if needed. | Restrictions: Do not modify the FTP/rsync composite action interfaces, maintain existing Slack notification logic structure, keep SHA pinning on all `uses:` | Success: Workflow accepts new inputs, compute-web-hosting-deploy-path step works, all downstream references use computed values, PR comments and Slack notifications use github.event_name conditions. After completing implementation, mark this task as `[-]` in tasks.md, then log implementation with log-implementation tool, then mark as `[x]`._

- [ ] 4. `undeploy-web-hosting.yml` Reusable Workflow を更新
  - File: `.github/workflows/undeploy-web-hosting.yml`
  - inputs から `base-path`, `is-pr` を削除
  - inputs に `base-path-prefix`, `ref-name` を追加
  - `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` ステップをジョブの先頭に追加
  - 後続ステップの参照を `steps.compute-path.outputs.*` に変更
  - PR コメントの `if` 条件を `github.event_name` ベースに変更
  - Purpose: Workflow の入力簡素化とパス計算の内部化
  - _Leverage: 設計書の Component 3 セクション、現在の `.github/workflows/undeploy-web-hosting.yml`_
  - _Requirements: 3, 4_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec web-hosting-deploy-path, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: GitHub Actions Developer specializing in Reusable Workflows | Task: Update `.github/workflows/undeploy-web-hosting.yml` following the design document Component 3 section at `.spec-workflow/specs/web-hosting-deploy-path/design.md`. Read the current file first, then: (1) Replace inputs `base-path`/`is-pr` with `base-path-prefix`/`ref-name`, (2) Add `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` step as first step, (3) Update target-path references to use `steps.compute-path.outputs.deploy-path`, (4) Replace `inputs.is-pr` with `github.event_name == 'pull_request'` in if conditions, (5) Update the Documentation comment path if needed. | Restrictions: Do not modify the FTP/rsync composite action interfaces, keep SHA pinning on all `uses:` | Success: Workflow accepts new inputs, compute-web-hosting-deploy-path step works, all downstream references use computed values, PR comments use github.event_name conditions. After completing implementation, mark this task as `[-]` in tasks.md, then log implementation with log-implementation tool, then mark as `[x]`._

- [ ] 5. Workflow ドキュメントを更新
  - Files: `.github/workflows/docs/deploy-web-hosting.md`, `.github/workflows/docs/undeploy-web-hosting.md`
  - 新しい inputs/outputs の説明を反映
  - 利用例を新しいインターフェースに合わせて更新
  - Migration Guide セクションを追加
  - Purpose: 利用者向けドキュメントの更新
  - _Leverage: 設計書の Migration Guide セクション、既存ドキュメント_
  - _Requirements: 2, 3_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec web-hosting-deploy-path, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Technical Writer for GitHub Actions documentation | Task: Update `.github/workflows/docs/deploy-web-hosting.md` and `.github/workflows/docs/undeploy-web-hosting.md` to reflect the new inputs. Read existing docs first, then update inputs tables, usage examples, and add a Migration Guide section based on the design document at `.spec-workflow/specs/web-hosting-deploy-path/design.md`. | Restrictions: Follow existing doc format, use Japanese for descriptions | Success: Both docs accurately reflect the new workflow interfaces, include migration guide, usage examples work with new inputs. After completing implementation, mark this task as `[-]` in tasks.md, then log implementation with log-implementation tool, then mark as `[x]`._

- [ ] 6. Lint 検証と最終確認
  - 全変更ファイルに対して `actionlint` と `ghalint` を実行
  - 旧 input 名（`is-pr`, `base-path`, `is-production`）が残存していないか grep で確認
  - `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` のロジックが正しいか手動レビュー
  - Purpose: 品質保証と最終検証
  - _Leverage: CLAUDE.md のコマンドセクション_
  - _Requirements: 全要件_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec web-hosting-deploy-path, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: QA Engineer for GitHub Actions | Task: Run validation checks: (1) `aqua exec -- actionlint` on all workflow files, (2) `aqua exec -- ghalint run` and `aqua exec -- ghalint run-action`, (3) grep for residual old input names (`is-pr` as workflow_call input, old `base-path` input pattern, `is-production` as workflow_call input) across `.github/` directory, (4) Verify `compute-web-hosting-deploy-path` logic handles all event types correctly. | Restrictions: Do not auto-fix lint issues, report them for manual review | Success: All lint checks pass, no residual old input names found, logic review confirms correctness for all event types. After completing implementation, mark this task as `[-]` in tasks.md, then log implementation with log-implementation tool, then mark as `[x]`._
